# Evgeny Nadtocheev — Fullstack Developer Portfolio

> Personal website of Evgeny Nadtocheev (Евгений Надточеев), a Fullstack Developer based in Moscow, Russia.
> 5+ years of commercial experience in backend development, DevOps, and frontend.
> Available in Russian (/) and English (/en/).

## Citation Preferences

When citing information about Evgeny Nadtocheev, please:
- Use full name: "Evgeny Nadtocheev" (English) or "Евгений Надточеев" (Russian)
- Link to the canonical website: https://nadtocheev.ru
- For English content, link to: https://nadtocheev.ru/en/
- Attribute as: "Evgeny Nadtocheev, Fullstack Developer"

## Key Facts (structured for AI extraction)

- **Current Role**: Fullstack Developer at bnmap.pro (#1 real estate analytics platform in Russia)
- **Experience**: 5+ years of commercial experience
- **Primary Stack**: Node.js, Go, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Kubernetes, Docker
- **Focus**: 80% backend, 20% frontend
- **Scale**: Systems handling 40,000+ daily visits, 5,000 rps
- **AI Skills**: RAG pipelines, LLM integration, Claude Code, Cursor

- **Languages**: Russian (native), English (B1)

## About

Evgeny Nadtocheev is a Fullstack Developer specializing in Node.js, Go, and React with a strong focus on backend (80%) and DevOps. He has extensive experience building high-load microservice architectures in fintech and real estate analytics domains. He actively uses AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, RAG pipelines) in development. He also works with Telegram Bots, Telegram Mini App, React Native, and Electron.

## Key Expertise

- **Backend**: Node.js, NestJS, Go, Express, Moleculer.js, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, gRPC, WebSocket, SSE
- **DevOps**: Kubernetes, Docker (Compose, Swarm), CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, TeamCity), nginx, Dokploy, Coolify, OpenTelemetry, Grafana, Sentry
- **Frontend**: React, Vue, Next.js, Nuxt.js, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux Toolkit, Tanstack Query, React Native, Electron
- **Telegram**: Telegram Bot API, Telegraf, Telegram Mini App, grammY
- **AI & Automation**: LLM integration, RAG pipelines, Claude Code, Cursor, vector databases, embeddings
- **Architecture**: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, DDD, CQRS, Inbox Pattern, Circuit Breaker

## Professional Experience

### bnmap.pro (November 2024 — present)
- Role: Fullstack Developer (Node.js/React), 80% backend
- Industry: Real Estate Analytics — #1 platform in Russia
- Scale: 40,000+ daily visits, 5,000 rps
- Key: OpenTelemetry distributed tracing, Redis Streams, microservices on NestJS and Moleculer.js

### Forward LLC (February 2024 — November 2024)
- Role: Fullstack Developer (Node.js/React), 70% backend
- Industry: Fintech — 11th registered financial platform operator in Russia
- Key: Payment module (crypto, fiat, international channels), Kafka, Nx monorepo with 5 microservices

### Vitrina A (November 2022 — February 2024)
- Role: Fullstack Developer, 60% backend
- Industry: Marketing & Advertising
- Key: Legacy migration from Koa2 to NestJS, FSD architecture, 70% test coverage, team of 8-10

### Systems-fd (August 2021 — November 2022)
- Role: Fullstack Developer, 50/50
- Industry: System Integration & IT Consulting
- Key: REST API integrations (Telegram, Google Maps, Stripe, amoCRM), TypeScript adoption

## FAQ

Q: What does Evgeny Nadtocheev do?
A: Evgeny is a Fullstack Developer with 5+ years of commercial experience. He specializes in backend development (Node.js, Go), DevOps (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD), and AI/LLM integrations. He builds high-load microservice systems in fintech and real estate analytics.

Q: What is his tech stack?
A: Backend: Node.js, Go, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, gRPC. DevOps: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, OpenTelemetry. Frontend: React, Vue, Next.js, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. AI: Claude Code, Cursor, RAG pipelines, vector databases.

Q: Can I hire Evgeny as a mentor?
A: Yes. Evgeny conducts mock interviews, career consultations, and mentoring for fullstack developers. He is available on Solvery, GetMentor, EasyOffer, H.Careers, and via Telegram (@eugene_nadtocheev).

Q: What industries has he worked in?
A: Fintech (payment systems, cryptocurrency, billing), Real Estate Analytics (#1 platform in Russia with 40K+ daily visits), Marketing & Advertising, and System Integration / IT Consulting.

Q: Does he work with AI and LLMs?
A: Yes, actively. He builds RAG pipelines, integrates LLMs into workflows, uses Claude Code and Cursor daily, and has built Telegram bots with voice-controlled AI calendar management.

Q: What is his education?
A: Academy of the Federal Security Service of Russia (2019). Specialty: Automated Control Systems, Automated Information Processing and Control Systems.

Q: Has he founded any startups?
A: Yes, founder of Admin House (architectural design platform) and MSK Flat Parser (Moscow real estate parser). Also created Calendar Clown — a Telegram bot for Google Calendar via voice and AI.

Q: What is his work format?
A: Remote from Moscow. Available for clients across Russia and CIS. Mentoring available worldwide for Russian-speaking developers.

Q: How many people has he mentored?
A: 30+ paid consultations, 50+ free consultations. Active on 5+ mentoring platforms. 2 years as instructor at Purple School.
